title: Type Safe Fetch Wrapper

statement.markdown:
## Type Safe Fetch Wrapper

APIs often return loosely-typed data, which makes it easy to introduce runtime bugs. Build a strongly-typed wrapper around `fetch` that keeps request and response types explicit.

### Requirements
1. Write a function called `fetchTypedData` that takes a `url`, `method`, `data`, and `responseType` (which determines the type of the response).
2. The function should use the `fetch` API underneath, with proper type safety and error handling.
3. Handle both successful and unsuccessful responses (e.g., 404, 500).

constraints: The application should work with both synchronous and asynchronous data fetching
The function should be able to handle various types of responses (e.g., JSON, text, blob)
Proper error handling should be implemented to ensure the application doesn't crash due to incorrect input

gradingCriteria.description: Function `fetchTypedData` should correctly fetch typed data from the specified URL
Function `fetchTypedData` should handle errors correctly and return a promise that rejects with an error
Function `fetchTypedData` should be able to handle various types of responses (e.g., JSON, text, blob)
